dialog1.1:
1. What is the first statement of the “Three statements of cells”?
                a. Cells come from pre existing cells
                b. Cells are the basic unit of life
                c. Every living things are made of cells
                d. All of the above
dialog1.2:
2. Which of the following statements is incorrect?
                a. Cells are not important, besides living without them is better.
                b. Cells have two types . Red and white blood cells.
                c. Cells have two types. They are not important.
                d. none of the above
dialog1.3:
3. ___ cells are also called eukaryotic cells
                a. White
                b. Yellow
                c. Red
                d. Violet
dialog1.4:
4. ___ cells are called leukocytes
                a. Red
                b. Violet
                c. White
                d. Green
dialog1.5:
5. Does bacterium contain cells?
                a. No
                b. Yes
                c. I do not know
                d. Some

dialog2.2: 2.We have ‘less’ than a thousand cells in our body.
dialog2.3: 3.Red blood cells transport ‘carbon dioxide’ to our lungs
